propose:
Propose optimized versions of this code package based on these suggestions, ensuring exact functionality preservation across all files.

Suggestions:
##SUGGESTIONS##

Original Code (each file prefixed with '# /full/path/to/file'):
##CODE##

Instructions:
1. Apply ONLY suggestion-related changes
2. Preserve imports, names, signatures where possible
3. Return a Python dict with full file paths as keys (e.g., {'/mnt/c/Users/dfoss/Desktop/LocalAIModels/CodeOptiFix/cli.py': 'code'})
4. No markdown fences, return raw code per file
5. If suggestions unclear, return original code unchanged
